name: dev.git
description: Git repository monitoring — no shell, direct git invocation

tools.name: git.status
tools.description: Porcelain git status for a repository

path.description: Absolute path to git repository (defaults to RMNG_PROJECT_ROOT)

tools.name: git.diff
tools.description: Show diff stat for working tree or staged changes

path.description: Absolute path to git repository (defaults to RMNG_PROJECT_ROOT)

staged.description: If true, show staged (--cached) diff only
